title: Okay, this unleashed my agent
summary: AI Jason reviews autonomous agent implementations including Autoresearch, AutoAgent, and Crewlet. The video covers a 3-layer memory system in Claude Code, self-evolution mechanisms in Hermes and Openclaw, and how these enable agents to tackle complex tasks.
